title: Dhurandhar merchandise case: Madras High Court prohibits unauthorised sale on Amazon, Flipkart, and Instagram
content: Justice Senthilkumar Ramamoorthy also directs a host of Internet Service Providers to block pirated versions of the sequel Dhurandhar The Revenge on websites

title: Three held for illegal LPG refilling racket in Narsingi; large haul seized
content: During the inspection, officials found that domestic cylinders were being illegally refilled into commercial cylinders

title: Man shot dead outside gym in Chandigarh, second firing in 24 hours
content: The attackers came on a motorcycle, and one of them opened fire at the victim, identified as Charanpreet, as he was stepping out of a gym, they added.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: How to check your name in electoral roll before March 26 deadline
content: If your name is not yet included and you wish to vote in the April 23 election, you can apply for inclusion until March 26

title: Indian vessel ‘Jag Laadki’ carrying over 80,000 metric tonnes of crude oil reaches Gujarat’s Mundra Port
content: Adani Ports, which operates Mundra Port, said in a statement that the crude oil carried by ‘Jag Laadki’ was sourced from the UAE and loaded at Fujairah Port there

title: ECI reshuffles 13 IAS officers in West Bengal, appoints DM-cum-DEOs ahead of Assembly polls
content: According to an official communication issued by the poll body, officers including Jitin Yadav (Cooch Behar), Sandeep Ghosh (Jalpaiguri), Vivek Kumar (Uttar Dinajpur), Rajanvir Singh Kapur (Malda) and R. Arjun (Murshidabad) have been posted as DM-cum-DEOs

title: Watch: Eight killed in Indore house fire after EV blast; Govt. orders probe
content: Eight members of a family, including two children, were killed in a fire triggered by an explosion at an electric vehicle charging point in Indore early on Wednesday, March 18.

title: Tamil Nadu election: Persons with disabilities to launch campaign for accessibility in Chennai
content: Disability Rights Alliance member Smitha Sadasivan said, “We want more demonstrations on EVMs so that persons with disabilities and their supporters can get a clear idea of how to plan the voting process in a manner suitable to each individual.”

title: Telangana Police constitute nine-member SIT to probe Moinabad drug, arms case
content: An official memorandum issued by the Director General of Police on March 17 stated that the nine-member SIT will function under the overall supervision of Future City Commissioner of Police G. Sudheer Babu.

title: Assam study sheds new light on sun’s surface tremors
content: The tiny five-minute vibrations may hold big answers for scientists trying to understand the powerful solar storms that sometimes affect Earth, Tezpur University researchers say

title: Prajwal Revanna sexual abuse case: SIT files charge-sheet against 39 for circulating explicit content
content: The accused allegedly purchased 70 pendrives to circulate the obscene content, and the police reportedly found that Harish, one of the accused, purchased them by paying through a UPI payment. The police collected the details of the purchase.

title: Tamil Nadu election: EPIC valid across State if voter is on electoral roll, says ECI
content: Even if a voter presents an EPIC issued in another constituency anywhere in the State, it will be accepted as proof of identity, so long as their name is listed in the electoral roll of the concerned polling station

title: Tenure of parliamentary panel on simultaneous polls extended
content: The extension allows the committee to gather more insights from constitutional experts and political leaders as it deliberates on key legislation aimed at synchronising national and State elections

title: India's semiconductor market to reach $300 billion by 2035: Deloitte report
content: “India is poised for a structural shift as local production is expected to meet more than 60% of domestic demand by the end of 2035,” a Deloitte report said

title: Bengaluru CCB arrests key gun supplier from Madhya Pradesh
content: Police recovered three pistols, a dismantled revolver, and around 50 rounds of ammunition from the accused. In total, multiple firearms and over 50 live bullets have been seized in the case so far.

title: Centre taking action against coaching centres for misleading advertisements: Pralhad Joshi
content: Issues of misleading advertisements by coaching centres have come down relatively, Mr. Joshi said, adding that many measures have been taken against violation of consumer protection rights

title: Tungabhadra Left Bank Canal breach leads to water loss in Koppal
content: A breach in the Tungabhadra Left Bank Canal, located between Basapur and Bandiharlapur villages in Koppal taluk, resulted in the loss of large quantities of water late on Tuesday night.

title: Pradyut Bordoloi joins BJP after quitting Congress ahead of Assam polls
content: This has put a question mark on the fate of Mr. Bordoloi’s son, Prateek Bordoloi, who is the Congress candidate from the Margherita Assembly seat in eastern Assam

title: In politics, there's no full stop: PM bids farewell to 59 Rajya Sabha members; hails Deve Gowda, Kharge, Sharad Pawar
content: Addressing the Upper House on the occasion of the biennial farewell, PM Modi said such moments naturally dissolve partisan divides

title: 2016 teachers' assault case: Court rejects discharge plea of Mumbai Mayor Ritu Tawde
content: According to the prosecution, the conflict erupted over the "sudden transfer" of a lady teacher who was reportedly battling cancer.

title: Maharashtra government takes action against absentee doctors
content: Public Health and Family Welfare Minister Prakash Abitkar informed the Maharashtra Legislative Council that the government has initiated steps to improve transparency and efficiency in the health department

title: SSLC annual exam-1 begins across Karnataka, over 8.65 lakh students enrolled
content: As many as 4,44,172 boys and 4,21,816 girls from 15,941 high schools for the examination across the state.

title: Acid attack on minor in Maharashtra village; locals demand arrest of accused
content: According to police, the girl was heading home from the school in the afternoon when she was attacked. She is currently taking treatment at the hospital in Loni

title: Kerala Assembly polls: LDF ally RJD announces candidates; Bhaskaran, P.K. Praveen, and Anil Kumar to contest
content: Rashtriya Janata Dal to field M.K. Bhaskaran from Vadakara in Kozhikode, P.K. Praveen from Koothuparamba in Kannur, and P.K. Anil Kumar from Kalpetta in Wayanad as LDF candidates

title: Hyderabad sees intermittent showers after midnight rain, IMD forecasts more thundershowers
content: At 10.49 a.m., IMD issued an alert forecasting light to moderate thundershowers for the next few hours in the northern parts of the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation (GHMC).

title: Government mandates airlines to reserve 60% of seats free of charge
content: The Ministry, in its latest release, urges strict adherence to ‘passenger rights framework, particularly in cases of delays, cancellations and denied boarding’

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Lok Sabha takes up discussion on Agriculture and Family Welfare demands for grants
content: 'In politics, there's no full stop': PM bids farewell to 59 members, hails Deve Gowda, Kharge, Sharad Pawar

title: Watch: Why is Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill so controversial?
content: Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill, 2026 has sparked a major political and legal debate. The proposed law aims to prevent forced religious conversions through strict rules, including a 60-day prior notice and severe penalties. While the government says it protects vulnerable individuals, critics argue it could violate fundamental rights, enable misuse, and impact personal freedom and interfaith relationships. The bill has been passed in both houses.

title: Three MBBS students killed in scooter accident in Kerala’s Kozhikode
content: The accident took place around 2.30 a.m. when the electric scooter they were travelling on crashed into an electric post and fell into a drainage

title: Eight killed in Indore house fire after EV charging point blast; probe ordered
content: There was an explosion at the charging point, and the fire in the car then engulfed the house, says Police Commissioner Santosh Kumar Singh

title: LPG crunch pushes PM POSHAN kitchens back to firewood, burdening women workers
content: The PM POSHAN scheme which serves about 11 crore children across 10.35 lakh schools, mostly from socially disadvantaged and low-income backgrounds, is now reverting to alternative fuels

title: BJP-NCP candidates secure top posts in Latur Zilla Parishad
content: The Zilla Parishad elections were held on February 7 and appointment of the president concluded on March 16

title: A kidney sale that led to a CB-CID probe in Tamil Nadu
content: The nexus of agents with doctors and hospitals in the illegal sale of kidneys was exposed, the then Deputy Superintendent of Police V. Parthasarathy, who led the Organised Crime Unit of the CB-CID in investigating the case, wrote in a police journal published in 2010

title: The fires of Madras’ kitchens
content: Amid the burning issue of LPG shortage, here’s a look at how cooking fuel has evolved over the years in Madras

title: Work to construct boat jetties in Edapalayam irrigation tank near Tiruvannamalai town commences
content: Funded under the Special Grant Fund 2025-26, the boating facility will be built at a cost of ₹2.62 crore

title: Election officials seize ₹6 lakh unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content: In a similar incident, election officials seized ₹2.5 lakh from textile traders near Ambur town in Tirupattur when they stopped their vehicle on Chennai - Bengaluru Highway (NH 48)

title: Air India plans to operate special flight to bring stranded passengers from Shannon
content: On Monday (March 16, 2026), the airline's A350 aircraft flying from New York to Delhi was diverted to Shannon due to a technical issue. Later, the plane was grounded at the Irish town

title: Those threatening peace to pay a very heavy price: J&K L-G Manoj Sinha
content: The remarks assume significance in the wake of recent protests against the killing of Iran’s supreme leader Ali Khamenei in Kashmir and the detention of scores of protesters thereafter.

title: Sara Ali Khan can come to Kedarnath if she submits affidavit that she is Sanatani, says BKTC chief
content: Dwivedi’s response came during a press conference held in Dehradun where he shared the recent proposal passed by the temple committee which bars entry of ‘non-sanatani’ into Kedarnath and Badrinath shrines

title: PDP legislator Mehdi moves ‘Kashmiri Pandit and Migrant Reintegration Bill’ in J&K Assembly
content: Hundreds of Kashmiri Pandits left the Kashmir valley and settled in various parts of the country in the 1990s in the face of raging militancy

title: Centre and State government have failed to manage LPG shortage: NCP-SP leader Jayant Patil
content: LPG shortage has created a panic situation in Maharashtra with people queuing outside the distribution centres

title: Nitish Kumar kicks off fourth phase of Samriddhi Yatra in Bihar
content: On the first day, he visited Bhagalpur and Banka where he inaugurated and laid the foundation stone of 641 projects worth ₹1151 crore.

title: After Centre’s assurance on LPG supply, Bombay HC disposes of PIL
content: The petitioners had sought a direction to increase the supply of domestic LPG cylinders to meet the requirements of local consumers

title: Armed Forces Tribunal stays retirement of Colonel Purohit, acquitted in 2008 Malegaon blast case
content: Purohit had approached the tribunal seeking promotion to the ranks of Colonel and Brigadier, arguing that his career progression was stalled due to his arrest and prolonged trial in the Malegaon blast case

title: Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi quits Congress
content: The trigger for Bordoloi was the alleged humiliation by State party president Gaurav Gogoi over the selection of candidate for the Laharighat Assembly constituency

title: Amid confusion over internal reservation, Karnataka SC/ST commission holds deliberations
content: Amid confusion over the internal reservation among Scheduled Castes, and reduction of overall reservation to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes from 56% to 50% for recruitment to 56,432 posts, the Karnataka State Commission for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes held deliberations with senior officials, former KPSC functionaries, and community representatives

title: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, agree on keeping Strait of Hormuz safe
content: Mr. Modi said he and the UAE President agreed on the importance of ensuring safe and free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz

title: Karnataka government plans new Excise Act to curb illegal sale of liquor
content: Excise Minister R.B. Thimmapur informed the Legislative Assembly that the government is considering revising the Karnataka Excise Act, 1965, and introducing a new law to curb the illegal sale of liquor

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Nemom constituency in for a tight and unpredictable contest
content: While LDF has announced incumbent MLA V. Sivankutty as its candidate, Rajeev Chandrasekhar will contest for NDA. UDF yet to propose its candidate. With BJP  again setting high hopes for constituency, LDF fighting hard to defend its turf and UDF yet to reveal its cards, an exciting contest is on the cards in Nemom

title: There are some problems in supply of certain drugs only at primary health centres: Karnataka Health Minister
content: Acknowledging that there were some problems related to the supply of certain medicines at primary health centres in the State, Health and Family Welfare Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao, however, told the Legislative Council that the drugs were not in short supply at State-run hospitals at the district and the taluk level

title: Over 200 signatories seek Rahul Gandhi’s apology for conduct within Parliament complex
content: The signatories allege that the Congress leader and other MPs organised a protest on the steps of Parliament despite the Speaker’s direction against any such demonstration within the premises

title: Redeployment of specialist doctors from CHCs to taluk hospitals done to reduce neonatal mortality, says Karnataka Health Minister
content: Health Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao has said that redeployment of gynaecologists and anaesthetists from community health centres in rural areas with lesser deliveries to taluk hospitals was done in an effort to reduce neonatal deaths after an audit of neonatal deaths in different areas of the State

title: Land acquisition notification ahead of polls keeps Sabari rail hopes alive
content: The notification, which mentions the survey numbers of land parcels to be acquired in Ernakulam, Kottayam and Idukki districts, was issued by the Revenue department on March 14, a day before the Assembly election was announced

title: Opposition’s protest against new rural jobs Act is a failure: Shivraj Singh Chouhan
content: Defending the VB-G RAM G Act, the Rural Development Minister says it is an upgraded framework for rural employment, and the new structure provided stronger safeguards for workers while improving productivity

title: Congress, Rahul Gandhi endorsing ‘anti-India’ report, claims BJP
content: The report by the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom (USCIRF) undermines India’s image as it sought sanctions on the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) and the Research & Analysis Wing (RAW), says party spokesperson Sambit Patra

title: UGC-like funding mechanism to be adopted under Shiksha Adhishthan: Education Ministry
content: The VBSA Bill was intended to split grants-disbursal from regulation to avoid conflicts of interest; Opposition MPs on Joint Committee raise concerns about increasing centralisation, future funding of public universities

title: ₹60,000 crore subsidy, Amrit Bharat trains boost affordable rail travel: Vaishnaw
content: Railway Minister says at present, 133 Amrit Bharat trains are at various stages of manufacturing, with services already introduced in States such as West Bengal, Assam, Kerala and Tamil Nadu.

title: Why heirs of dead depositors can’t be told about unclaimed funds, SC asks govt.
content: The court was hearing a petition filed to ensure that information on money held by investors and depositors in dormant or inoperative accounts be made publicly available on a centralised platform

title: Day after NDA’s clean sweep in Bihar, Congress MLA says skipped RS poll on State party’s chief’s advice; Rajesh Ram denies claim
content: The Mahagathbandhan joint candidate, Amarendra Dhari Singh, lost the biennial election to the Upper House of Parliament after four MLAs from the Opposition alliance refrained from voting on March 16

title: NIA probes wider network after arrest of U.S., Ukrainian nationals
content: NIA examining digital footprints of accused; in social media post, accused U.S. citizen allegedly claims to run covert operations against authoritarian regimes; Ukraine Embassy seeks consular access to accused

title: India salutes maritime heroes for safeguarding critical energy supplies
content: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal commends the courage of Indian seafarers aboard LPG carriers Shivalik and Nanda Devi, which safely navigated the strategically sensitive Strait of Hormuz amid heightened regional tensions

title: Union Govt writes to States, UTs for speedily approving pending, new gas pipeline projects
content: This forms part of the government’s objective to push for piped natural gas as it seeks to ease pressure on LPG

title: Tamil Nadu’s mental health policy for educational institutions spells out preventive measures
content: The policy, issued earlier this month, provides for mental health and counselling services, data-driven action, and a framework table for suicide prevention among students

title: JD(U) leader K.C. Tyagi quits party
content: The former Rajya Sabha member says ideological commitments remain unchanged; likely to join another party active in Uttar Pradesh

title: Assam’s dramatis personae: Himanta, Gaurav, ‘Miyas’ and also development
content: The BJP’s pet narrative of protecting Assam from the ‘infiltrators’, and the personal rivalry between Himanta Biswa Sarma and Gaurav Gogoi are likely to dominate Assam’s first single-phase Assembly polls in 25 years

title: WNBA, union reach verbal agreement on new CBA
content: After a prolonged labor battle, the WNBA and players' union have reached a verbal agreement on the terms for a new CBA.

title: Venezuela outduels USA to capture first WBC title
content: Venezuela won the World Baseball Classic for the first time, rebounding from Bryce Harper's tying home run in the eighth inning to beat the United States 3-2 on Eugenio Suárez's go-ahead double in the ninth.

title: U.S. laments another WBC loss as star offense lags
content: Team USA, boasting one of the most talented rosters ever assembled, failed to live up to its billing Tuesday night and could only watch as Venezuela celebrated its first World Baseball Classic championship.

title: Mark saves day, sends Texas to NCAA first round
content: Tramon Mark hit a fadeaway jumper from just inside the 3-point line with 1.1 seconds left, and Texas survived a late rally to beat NC State 68-66 on Tuesday night in a First Four matchup.

title: Howard checks last box with first tourney win
content: Howard held off a late surge from UMBC to earn the first NCAA tournament victory in program history, an 86-83 decision in the First Four on Tuesday night.

title: Morocco given AFCON title after Senegal 'forfeit'
content: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.

title: Crosby: I was 'livid' when Ravens nixed trade
content: Raiders defensive end Maxx Crosby said he was "livid" and "confused" by the Ravens' decision to back out of a trade that would have sent him to Baltimore in exchange for two first-round picks due to medical concerns.

title: Ex-reality TV star Holmes repeats Iditarod win
content: Former reality TV star Jessie Holmes cruised to a victory in the Iditarod, becoming the third competitor in the 54-year history of the race to repeat the year after winning for the first time.

content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

content: Beers has never had alcohol, but she seized the opportunity to capitalize on her name when her jersey went viral.

content: Chelsea may be club world champions, but Tuesday's 3-0 defeat to PSG in the Champions League showed just how far off the pace the Blues really are.

content: Arsenal should feel the pressure as Premier League leaders. Instead, they look comfortable as a quadruple is in their sights.

content: The NBA seems closer than ever to adding two franchises. Here's what we know, including how an expansion draft could work.

content: Will any of the wild cards make a run? Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings, more.

content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

content: Check out the results of our final fantasy baseball head-to-head points mock draft of 2026, featuring round-by-round picks and a snapshot of the rosters of all 10 teams.

title: 'I salute every boxer out there' -- Lamar Jackson boxes in offseason workout
content: Jackson is looking to bounce back after a hamstring injury which saw him play in only 13 games last season.

title: In final window before World Cup, Pochettino's USMNT roster shows softened stance on club form
content: Mauricio Pochettino once demanded peak club performance from his USMNT players, but his March squad raises the question of whether that's negotiable.

title: Pickups: Look to Jazz, Trail Blazers for waiver-wire options
content: Every week in fantasy basketball, there are available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man United want Wolves' João Gomes
content: Wolves midfielder João Gomes is a target for Liverpool and Manchester United. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: KKR's Cameron Green gets angry at reporter; interview ends with 'waste of time' remark
content: The incident took place outside Western Australia’s dressing room after the third day of the match on Monday. A report in The Age detailed the interaction with 'visibly annoyed' Green, stating that the interview began with a question about Green’s century for Western Australia against New South Wales.

title: ‘Favourites tag doesn’t come easy’: Shubman Gill’s bold Team India message
content: Shubman Gill, recipient of the Polly Umrigar Award, emphasised the collective effort behind India's dominant status and their hard-earned reputation as favourites. He highlighted the team's fearless approach, shaped by coach Gautam Gambhir and support staff, and reflected on a successful past year, looking forward to crucial upcoming Test series.

title: Tech layoffs: Meta, Amazon and other companies cutting jobs in 2026
content: Tech workers face a tough start to 2026 as big companies announce massive job cuts.  Automation and AI are reshaping the industry, leading to widespread layoffs.  Firms like Amazon, Block, and Atlassian are reducing their workforce.  Oracle and Meta are also reportedly considering substantial job cuts.  This trend highlights a significant shift in the tech sector's operational models.

title: 'Anxiety ho rahi thi': Shivam Dube explains why he took train after T20 World Cup win
content: Following India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory, Shivam Dube bypassed his flight to rush home to his family. He opted for an early morning train to Mumbai, traveling discreetly in a 3rd AC compartment. Dube's crucial contributions with bat and ball cemented his status as an impactful all-rounder in the triumphant campaign.

title: Raghav Chadha proposes joint tax filing for married couples — here’s how it could work
content: Aam Aadmi Party MP Raghav Chadha proposed reforms to ease financial burdens, advocating for optional joint income tax filing for couples, full tax exemption on disability pensions for all wounded soldiers, and removal of bank minimum balance penalties. These proposals aim to create a fairer financial system for ordinary citizens amidst ongoing pensioner concerns.

title: Zerodha founder Nithin Kamath says I don't use internet banking apps; here's why
content: Zerodha CEO Nithin Kamath revealed he avoids banking apps due to their invasive permissions, questioning why they need access to SMS, contacts, and calls. He highlighted the Principle of Least Privilege, stating apps should only access necessary data. In contrast, Zerodha's Kite app requests zero permissions, a deliberate choice reflecting their 'do unto others' philosophy, fostering user trust.

title: Helicopter overturns and crashes in eastern Nepal while landing, one injured—Watch
content: An Air Dynasty helicopter carrying a dead body and five passengers crashed while attempting to land in a field in Nepal's Khotang district. One passenger sustained injuries, while the pilot and other passengers were unharmed. High winds or dust during landing are suspected as contributing factors to the incident.

title: Bank holidays in March: How many days are banks closed this week? Check state-wise list
content: March 2026 brings a series of bank holidays across India, impacting branch operations significantly. Customers should note closures for festivals like Gudhi Padwa, Ugadi, Eid-Ul-Fitr, and Ramzan, alongside state-specific observances and the second and fourth Saturdays. Digital banking remains available for routine transactions, but services requiring branch visits must be rescheduled.

title: India opens anti-dumping probe into ethyl chloroformate imports from China
content: India has launched an anti-dumping probe into Chinese ethyl chloroformate imports following a complaint by domestic producer Paushak, alleging unfair pricing that harms local industry. The investigation, initiated by the Directorate General of Trade Remedies, will assess if duties are needed to protect Indian manufacturers. This move is part of a broader effort to curb cheap imports.

title: SBI warns customers: Scammers are sending fake 'bank letters' with these app links
content: State Bank of India has issued a warning to customers about fraudsters sending fake bank letters and KYC alerts containing malicious APK links. These links can compromise phones and lead to financial loss. SBI advises customers to download apps only from official app stores and never install suspicious APKs.

title: Indore: Video captures sparks after blast in EV charging point that triggered short circuits
content: A devastating fire, originating from an EV charging point, rapidly engulfed a three-storey house in Indore, exacerbated by multiple LPG cylinder explosions. The blaze claimed seven lives and injured three, prompting investigations into EV safety and storage of flammable materials. Authorities are establishing an SOP for EV charging.

title: Risk vs roti: Indians stay back in Gulf as war intensifies - here's why
content: Amidst escalating Middle Eastern tensions, many Indian blue-collar workers are staying put for jobs and family support, despite recruiters warning of potential layoffs. While salaries remain consistent, some workers are on mandatory leave as demand for labour declines. Experts foresee a hiring surge post-conflict, but current uncertainty impacts operations and domestic hiring.

title: Internet reveals why Vaibhav Sooryavanshi shouldn't have watched 'Dhurandhar'
content: 14-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral after naming Dhurandhar his favourite film at the BCCI Naman Awards 2026, sparking debate as it’s A-rated. While excelling in cricket with record performances, he aims to win IPL 2026 with Rajasthan Royals. Balancing fame and studies, he also missed a Class 10 board exam due to commitments.

title: 'Will be very bad for Pakistan': Afghan IPL star warns after attack, seeks India's help
content: Afghanistan spinner Allah Ghazanfar made an emotional plea to the world after a devastating airstrike hit a Kabul rehabilitation centre. He highlighted the human cost of escalating Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions, urging global intervention to de-escalate the conflict. Ghazanfar stressed India's close ties and the need for dialogue to prevent such tragedies.

title: ‘Freedom of speech cannot be absolute’: Vaishnaw on Nora Fatehi’s ‘Sarke Chunariya’ ban
content: The Union government has officially banned the song 'Sarke Chunariya' following widespread outrage over its vulgar lyrics and visuals. Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw confirmed the ban in Lok Sabha, emphasizing that freedom of speech in India has reasonable constitutional limitations concerning public order, decency, and morality. The move comes after numerous complaints and criticism from women's commissions and public figures.

title: 'Kind people': Iran thanks India as it receives first medical aid shipment from New Delhi
content: India has dispatched its first medical aid shipment to Iran, a gesture met with gratitude from the Iranian Embassy. This assistance arrives as Iran faces significant casualties and attacks on healthcare facilities due to ongoing military campaigns. Despite challenges, Iran's healthcare system remains largely functional, with contingency plans in place for worsening conditions and potential health risks from environmental factors.

title: Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi joins BJP; CM hints at recommending him for polls
content: Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi has switched from Congress to BJP, a day after leaving his former party. Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma welcomed him, suggesting Bordoloi will contest assembly elections. Bordoloi cited internal party issues and feeling insulted. This move precedes the upcoming Assam Assembly elections, with the BJP seeking a third term.

title: India buys more Russian crude oil amid US-Iran war; tankers headed to China make U-turn
content: Data from Vortexa Ltd. indicates that at least seven vessels transporting Russian crude have altered their routes mid-journey, changing course from China to India. At present, all major Indian refiners are actively sourcing Russian oil.

title: Kuldeep touches Jadeja, Rivaba’s feet: Viral wedding moment melts hearts - Watch
content: A touching moment at Kuldeep Yadav's wedding reception saw the Indian spinner seeking blessings from Ravindra Jadeja and his wife Rivaba by touching their feet. This humble gesture, deeply rooted in Indian tradition, quickly went viral, earning widespread praise from fans.

title: Travis Kelce faces setback ahead of wedding to Taylor Swift
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are gearing up for a new chapter in their lives as the star player trains for his comeback to the field for his 14th season with the Kansas City Chiefs, ending all speculations about a potential retirement. Amid all the this, the popular tight end faces a heartbreaking loss in his career, just weeks before his wedding to Taylor Swift.

title: Dhoni to hand WK gloves to Samson, captaincy next? Kumble on CSK plan
content: Sanju Samson embarks on a new IPL chapter with Chennai Super Kings after a stellar T20 World Cup.  Anil Kumble highlights Samson's form, leadership potential, and regional connection as significant assets for CSK.  His arrival strengthens the squad and offers stability, potentially even taking over keeping duties from MS Dhoni.

title: 'Riyan Parag yet to establish': Chopra’s blunt take on RR’s ‘inexperienced’ squad
content: Rajasthan Royals face challenges ahead of IPL 2026. Former India batter Aakash Chopra points to a young batting lineup lacking international experience. Key players like Yashasvi Jaiswal and Dhruv Jurel are still developing. Spin bowling also presents concerns with recent form issues for Ravi Bishnoi and Ravindra Jadeja.  The team's strategy may impact Shimron Hetmyer's effectiveness.

title: Mookie Betts’ wife shares baby shower clip as WBC comment resurfaces
content: ​Los Angeles Dodgers star Mookie Betts is enjoying a special time off the field as his family gets bigger. A few days after the couple welcomed their third child, his wife Brianna Hammonds shared a video from her baby shower. The clip was from before the baby arrived, but it gave fans a look at a happy moment the family had been waiting for.

title: MP: Facebook lover bludgeons woman to death over marriage pressure
content: A young woman's decomposed body was discovered in a deserted house in Govari village, leading to the arrest of Chandrabhan Rathore. The accused confessed to murdering 24-year-old Kajal Puri on February 17 after she pressured him for marriage, following a relationship initiated on Facebook. Police recovered crucial evidence, including the victim's phone and the motorcycle used in the crime.

title: LPG crisis: Centre pushes states to fast-track switch to PNG amid Hormuz disruption
content: Escalating Middle East tensions are impacting Indian households and businesses reliant on LPG imports. To counter supply disruptions, the government is urging a swift shift to Piped Natural Gas (PNG), fast-tracking approvals and waiving charges for pipeline infrastructure. This initiative aims to ease the strain on LPG supplies, with hospitality and industrial sectors already facing significant challenges.

title: Indian IT stocks surge! Infosys, TCS, Wipro rise up to 4%; why are they rallying?
content: Among individual stocks, Coforge and Persistent Systems surged more than 4% each. TCS, the country’s largest software exporter, advanced around 3%, while LTIMindtree also posted gains of over 3%.

title: 'When HC can't decide correct answer, how can students?': SC on law officer recruitment question
content: The Supreme Court intervened in a Chandigarh law officer recruitment dispute where a question on judicial review immunity led to differing High Court judgments. The court acknowledged the complexity, stating both answers could be considered correct from a law graduate's perspective, deeming it unreasonable to expect a single definitive response from candidates.

title: Location vs Budget: How homebuyers can find the right balance
content: Homebuyers face a crucial dilemma balancing house price against location. Prime locations offer convenience and appreciation but come with high costs, while underdeveloped areas provide discounts but may lack immediate amenities. Emerging locations present a budget-friendly alternative with potential for future growth, requiring careful consideration of lifestyle and long-term needs for a sound investment.

title: 'Please don't share spoilers': Aditya Dhar requests everyone ahead of 'Dhurandhar 2' release
content: Ahead of 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' premiere, director Aditya Dhar passionately urged fans to safeguard the film's secrets. He expressed deep gratitude for the audience's connection to the first installment, emphasizing the sequel's aim to deliver unexpected emotions. Dhar implored viewers to experience the espionage epic in theaters, free from spoilers, to preserve its magic for everyone.

title: 3 kids among 9 killed in massive fire at residential building in Delhi's Palam
content: A devastating fire in southwest Delhi's Palam area claimed at least seven lives, including three children, on Wednesday morning. The blaze, which broke out near the Palam Metro Station, raged for nearly three hours, making rescue operations difficult. Reports indicated nine family members may have been trapped inside the building.

title: Cuba President guarantees 'unbreakable resistance' after Trump's takeover claim
content: Cuban leader Miguel Diaz-Canel has proclaimed 'iron-clad determination' to stand firm against aggressive US posturing, referencing Donald Trump's latest comments on 'taking over Cuba.' This declaration comes amid a dire fuel and economic crisis for the island, made worse by US blockades on oil shipments.

title: LPG cylinder rate, petrol, diesel price today: Check city-wise list of latest prices
content: The ongoing US-Iran war has meant that shipments from the Middle East and in particular the Strait of Hormuz have been held up. India imports a major chunk of its LPG needs, and a substantial percentage of that comes from the Middle East.

title: Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib Killed In Strikes: Israel
content: Israel's Defence Minister Israel Katz said on Wednesday that they "eliminated" Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib in a strike overnight.

title: High Alert In Maharashtra As 4 Thermal Power Stations Receive Drone Attack Threat
content: Security has been intensified at four major thermal power stations in Maharashtra's Vidarbha region after an email threat to target them with drones.

title: On Camera, Man Rams Bike With Car Over Land Deal In Karnataka
content: A 26-year-old man allegedly tried to get a businessman killed over a land deal by ramming his car into his two-wheeler. The incident that occurred in Mangaluru in Karnataka on Tuesday morning was captured on CCTV.

title: Inches From Ground, Chopper Loses Control. Horrifying Crash Seen In Video
content: A helicopter en route from Kathmandu to Nepal's Khotang district crashed on Wednesday while attempting a landing on a farm.

title: Rupee Falls To All-Time Low As Iran War Rages On: Is It All Bad?
content: Rupee hits record low amid Iran war: A weaker rupee makes imports more expensive. This, in turn, pushes consumers and firms to cut back on foreign purchases and look at domestic options.

title: Sensex Today, Stock Market Highlights: Sensex, Nifty End In Green For 3rd Straight Day
content: Stock Market Highlights: India VIX cools 13 per cent in two days. However, it is still well above pre-Iran war levels.

title: Trainee Cop Found Dead In Mumbai, Note Alleges Threats By Girlfriend's Parents
content: A 32-year-old police trainee was found dead at the Kalina Police Training Centre in Santacruz, with authorities recovering a suicide note from his possession that accused his girlfriend's parents

title: Delhi Man Rapes College Student At Birthday Party In Gurugram, Arrested: Police
content: Gurugram police arrested a Delhi resident for allegedly raping a 19-year-old college student during a house party in Sector 33 here, officials said on Tuesday.

title: Iran War Battered Your Portfolio? These 10 Stocks May Offer Relief
content: Best Stocks To Buy During Iran War: For investors with a medium-to-long-term view, the ongoing Iran war presents selective buying opportunities.

title: BJP Finalises Assam Seat Plan, PM Modi To Address 3 Rallies In April
content: Under the agreement, the BJP will contest 89 seats, while its allies Asom Gana Parishad will field candidates in 26 constituencies and Bodoland People's Front in 11.

title: India's Semiconductor Market To Reach $300 Billion By 2035: Report
content: India's semiconductor market is projected to nearly triple to USD 120 billion by 2030 and reach USD 300 billion by 2035, driven by the exponential adoption of artificial intelligence (AI), automotive growth, and data centre expansion

title: Nirav Modi Tells UK Court He Faces 'Real Risk Of Torture' In India
content: Fugitive diamond merchant Nirav Modi's application hearing seeking permission to reopen his extradition appeal concluded in High Court in London, with claims that he faces a "real risk of torture" during interrogations by investigating agencies

title: Ukraine Deploys 201 Drone Experts To Middle East To Counter Iran-Made Shahed
content: Ukraine has begun deploying dozens of its drone-defence specialists across the Middle East and Gulf, responding to requests from partner nations seeking help against Iran-made Shahed drones.

title: US Eases Sanctions On Iranian-Linked Tankers To Stabilise Global Oil Markets
content: The United States is turning to tankers linked to Iran to help move oil. This is the Donald Trump administration's effort to deal with rising oil prices as the US-Israeli war on Iran rages on.

title: PM Modi Condoles Loss Of Lives In Delhi Fire, Announces Rs 2 Lakh Aid
content: After a tragic fire at a building in New Delhi's Palam claimed nine lives on Wednesday, Prime Minister Narendra Modi offered condolences and announced an aid of Rs 2 lakh for the next of kin of the deceased.

title: Trump Relied On Faulty Early Intel To Blame Iran For Girls' School Strike: Report
content: Around 180people, most of them children, were killed in a missile strike on a school in Iran's Minab on the first day of the joint US-Israel military operations. US President Donald Trump was quick to blame Iran for the tragedy.

title: 14 Arrested For Eating Chicken Biryani On Boat In Ganga River In Varanasi
content: Fourteen people have been arrested on charges of defiling a place of worship and hurting religious feelings after a video purportedly showing them eating chicken biryani during an Iftar party hosted on a boat in the Ganga river

title: Day After Quitting Congress, Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi Crosses Over To BJP
content: A day after quitting Congress, Assam Lok Sabha MP Pradyut Bordoloi on Wednesday crossed over to the rival BJP, barely weeks ahead of the assembly elections in the state.

title: Iran To Hold Funerals For Larijani, Basij Chief As It Vows Vengeance
content: Iran will hold a funeral Wednesday for its security chief Ali Larijani as it vowed revenge, firing off a wave of missiles at Israel after it killed the powerful figure in an air strike.

title: Bhopal Cop Alleges Threat After Chaos Outside Home, Police Refutes Claim
content: According to a complaint, a group of unidentified men arrived in a four-wheeler, created a chaos outside Additional Director General (Training) of Madhya Pradesh Police, Raja Babu Singh's house, hurled abuses, and behaved aggressively.

title: Matt Leinart on unretiring USC No. 11: 'Not for sale'
content: former quarterback's no. 11 jersey has been retired for over two decades . leinart says there have been "multiple times" people have asked him to unretire it for a prospect . he said he would do it only for his son, Cole, who committed to SMU in November 2024 .

title: Broncos are all-in, and Dolphins are all-out, but does either strategy make sense?
content: the Broncos traded their first-, third- and fourth-round picks in this year's draft . they traded a wideout for Jaylen Waddle and a fourth round pick . the studs continue to indicate that they're tearing down their roster . a new regime appears to be going down that way .
